_comment: Care tasks. Fields: title, category, priority (critical/important/light), recurrence (daily/weekly/monthly/once), due_day (weekday name), due_date (YYYY-MM-DD), notes, owner, status (pending/done/overdue).

items.title: Morning medication and routine check-in
items.notes: Morning routine — confirm medications taken and check in on how the day is starting.

items.title: Weekly care coordination call
items.notes: Check in with care team or care coordinator for the week's plan.

items.title: Confirm upcoming appointments for this week
items.notes: Verify all upcoming medical and specialist appointments are confirmed.

items.title: Prescription refill check
items.notes: Verify medication supply levels mid-week. Order refills if needed.

items.title: Review care notes from the week
items.notes: Look back at the week's care log. Note anything to flag for next week.

items.title: Monthly insurance and billing review
items.notes: Review any outstanding insurance claims, EOBs, or care invoices.

items.title: Caregiver schedule check — confirm weekend coverage
items.notes: Confirm weekend caregiver schedule is set. Follow up if any gaps.

items.title: Specialist follow-up call overdue
items.notes: Need to call back the specialist's office with availability for follow-up appointment.

items.title: Evening check-in
items.notes: Brief evening check-in. Not urgent if day was smooth.
